maxSpawnDepth.description: Maximum nesting depth for sub-agent spawning. 1 = no nesting (default), 2 = sub-agents can spawn sub-sub-agents.

maxChildrenPerAgent.description: Maximum number of active children a single agent session can spawn (default: 5).

webhookUrl.description: Public HTTPS webhook URL registered with Telegram for inbound updates. This must be internet-reachable and requires channels.telegram.webhookSecret.

webhookSecret.description: Secret token sent to Telegram during webhook registration and verified on inbound webhook requests. Telegram returns this value for verification; this is not the gateway auth token and not the bot token.

webhookPath.description: Local webhook route path served by the gateway listener. Defaults to /telegram-webhook.

webhookHost.description: Local bind host for the webhook listener. Defaults to 127.0.0.1; keep loopback unless you intentionally expose direct ingress.

webhookPort.description: Local bind port for the webhook listener. Defaults to 8787; set to 0 to let the OS assign an ephemeral port.

webhookCertPath.description: Path to the self-signed certificate (PEM) to upload to Telegram during webhook registration. Required for self-signed certs (direct IP or no domain).

webhookUrl.description: Public HTTPS webhook URL registered with Telegram for inbound updates. This must be internet-reachable and requires channels.telegram.webhookSecret.

webhookSecret.description: Secret token sent to Telegram during webhook registration and verified on inbound webhook requests. Telegram returns this value for verification; this is not the gateway auth token and not the bot token.

webhookPath.description: Local webhook route path served by the gateway listener. Defaults to /telegram-webhook.

webhookHost.description: Local bind host for the webhook listener. Defaults to 127.0.0.1; keep loopback unless you intentionally expose direct ingress.

webhookPort.description: Local bind port for the webhook listener. Defaults to 8787; set to 0 to let the OS assign an ephemeral port.

webhookCertPath.description: Path to the self-signed certificate (PEM) to upload to Telegram during webhook registration. Required for self-signed certs (direct IP or no domain).

command.description: Command to run the MCP server

args.description: Arguments to pass to the command

env.description: Environment variables for the MCP server

allowedModels.description: Allowlist of provider/model keys like openai-codex/gpt-5.2.
